narrativeProgression.summary: Administrative records reveal prior attempts to bury this case.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: Dispatch pushes a crime scene map to SMS while social channels spread contradictory alibis.

threadUpdates.update: First Snow Body: Dispatch pushes a crime scene map to SMS while social channels spread contradictory alibis.
Peripheral signal tied to Dispatch freeze frame remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Red Creek Winter - Day 05 call log
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact appears authoritative but contains one intentional inconsistency tied to Dispatch freeze frame.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Red Creek Winter ARG artifact Day 05. Type: call_log. Clue focus: Dispatch freeze frame. Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. Subtle misleading cue included.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Red Creek Winter call_log audio cue for day 5. Clue anchor: Dispatch freeze frame. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Dispatch freeze frame and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_04.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Dispatch freeze frame.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
